title: Black & White Shader
description: A simple Black & Wite shader - not a boring grayscale
body:
This Shader is 100% Black & white, not a grayscale shader.
The shader can look ugly, but you have chosen it !


<details>
<summary>Preview</summary>

![Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/r1EogXS7/images/13ad2fbd57e0c61a806c520039a6bc410d9b3050.png)

Want an inverted version ?
click [here](https://modrinth.com/shader/white-black-shader) !
</details>
I am not going to create a basic shader, because of many they are, i will just create some cursed ones.
enjoy !
